input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.15.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.15.2.2
            TITLE: specific areas or items to be inspected are at the discretion of the chief technical inspector

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.15.2.2: Specific areas or items to be inspected are at the discretion of the Chief Technical Inspector
IN.15.2.2 Specific areas or items to be inspected are at the discretion of the Chief Technical Inspector

final_answer: Specific areas or items to be inspected are at the discretion of the Chief Technical Inspector
